title: createMemo
description: Creates a cached derived value. Use when computing a value from other signals. Only recomputes when dependencies change.
signature: createMemo<T>(fn: (prev: T | undefined) => T, value?: T, options?: MemoOptions<T>): Accessor<T>
returns_body: An <0>Accessor<T></0> that returns the memoized value. Acts as both a signal reader (trackable) and a computation (auto-updates).
usage_chained_status: The uptime monitor derives <0>latestSamples</0> from raw sample history, then rolls it up into one <1>overall</1> status. Because memos compare results before notifying, a sweep that leaves the rolled-up status unchanged stops the chain right there.
usage_table_rows: The status page turns targets, samples, and tallies into display rows with a single memo. The write effect just reads <0>rows()</0> and never repeats the per-target math.
in_the_wild: See both memos feed the generated status page in the <0>uptime-monitor walkthrough</0>.
